basicDetails.schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Package : Insurance Scheme For Health Workers Fighting COVID-19
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Department Of Health And Family Welfare

nodalDepartmentName.label: Department of Health and Family Welfare

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Package: Insurance Scheme for Health Workers Fighting COVID-19" by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India, aims to provide ₹50,00,000/- insurance cover to healthcare workers through financial protection against death or disability during COVID-19 duty.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Insurance Coverage:** ₹50,00,000/- provided in case of death or permanent disability due to COVID-19.- **Risk Coverage:** Covers loss of life due to COVID-19; covers accidental death during COVID-19-related duty.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial protection through insurance cover of ₹50,00,000/- to healthcare workers fighting COVID-19.

children.text: The scheme "Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Package: Insurance Scheme for Health Workers Fighting COVID-19" by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India, aims to provide ₹50,00,000/- insurance cover to healthcare workers through financial protection against death or disability during COVID-19 duty.
Insurance Coverage:
₹50,00,000/- provided in case of death or permanent disability due to COVID-19.
Risk Coverage:
Covers loss of life due to COVID-19; covers accidental death during COVID-19-related duty.
Step 1:
The concerned institution/department is informed about the claim.
Step 2:
The insurance company is intimated via email at "nia.312000@newindia.co.in".
Step 3:
The claimant fills the
claim form
and attaches the required documents.
Step 4:
The claimant submits the form to the healthcare institution/organization.
Step 5:
The institution verifies, certifies, and forwards the claim to the competent authority.
Step 6:
The competent authority submits the claim to the insurance company for approval.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The concerned institution/department is informed about the claim. **Step 2:** The insurance company is intimated via email at "nia.312000@newindia.co.in". **Step 3:** The claimant fills the [claim form](https://nhm.gov.in/New_Updates_2018/Om_and_orders/Pradhanmantri_Garib_Kalyan_Package/Pradhan%20Mantri%20Garib%20Kalyan%20Package-%20Insurance%20Scheme%20for%20Health%20Workers%20Fighting%20COVID-19.pdf) and attaches the required documents. **Step 4:** The claimant submits the form to the healthcare institution/organization. **Step 5:** The institution verifies, certifies, and forwards the claim to the competent authority. **Step 6:** The competent authority submits the claim to the insurance company for approval.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be a healthcare worker; including doctors, nurses, paramedics, and support staff. - The applicant must be directly involved in COVID-19 related duties. - The applicant must be a citizen of India. - The applicant must be working in a COVID-19 designated hospital or care facility. - The applicant must be registered under a government health program.

children.text: The applicant must be a healthcare worker; including doctors, nurses, paramedics, and support staff.
The applicant must be directly involved in COVID-19 related duties.
The applicant must be a citizen of India.
The applicant must be working in a COVID-19 designated hospital or care facility.
The applicant must be registered under a government health program.
